message:
refactor: Add modular imports and split runtime.zig helpers

- Add glob_ops.zig for globMatch, matchCharClass, rglobCollect
- Add list_conversion.zig for listFromTuple, listFromString, listFromAny
- Expose existing runtime submodules via runtime.zig imports

New code can use modular access: runtime.bool_ops.toBool()
Existing code unchanged - original functions remain for backwards compat.
